prompt_text:
### Demographics: 51-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 7 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis)
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Orthopedic fracture (healed)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~25 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Linagliptin 5mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 98.2 kg; Height 174.9 cm; BMI 32.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 116/61 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.7%; 9 months ago 8.4%; 6 months ago 7.9%; 3 months ago 7.4%; current 5.7%), FPG (12 months ago 226mg/dL; 9 months ago 175mg/dL; 6 months ago 201mg/dL; 3 months ago 184mg/dL; current 139mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 98.8kg; 9 months ago 100.2kg; 6 months ago 100.2kg; 3 months ago 96.8kg; current 98.2kg), Height (12 months ago 174.9cm; 9 months ago 174.9cm; 6 months ago 174.9cm; 3 months ago 174.9cm; current 174.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 32.0kg/m²; current 32.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 116mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 60mmHg; 9 months ago 62mmHg; 6 months ago 61mmHg; 3 months ago 61mmHg; current 61mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 54U/L; 9 months ago 45U/L; 6 months ago 46U/L; 3 months ago 54U/L; current 52U/L), AST (12 months ago 54U/L; 9 months ago 47U/L; 6 months ago 46U/L; 3 months ago 54U/L; current 53U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.4mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.4mg/dL; current 1.4mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 12mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 7.4mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 9.0mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 5.9mL/min/1.73m²; current 6mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 157mg/g; 9 months ago 112mg/g; 6 months ago 142mg/g; 3 months ago 140mg/g; current 113mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 85mg/dL; 9 months ago 85mg/dL; 6 months ago 87mg/dL; 3 months ago 85mg/dL; current 88mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 61mg/dL; 9 months ago 59mg/dL; 6 months ago 61mg/dL; 3 months ago 62mg/dL; current 60mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 132mg/dL; 9 months ago 133mg/dL; 6 months ago 136mg/dL; 3 months ago 136mg/dL; current 143mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.4g/dL; 9 months ago 11.3g/dL; 6 months ago 11.3g/dL; 3 months ago 10.8g/dL; current 10.8g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has limited financial resources and prefers low-cost options (budget ≤ KRW 200,000/month).
